description: 清新现代主题 - 蓝调极简,适合 AI / 产品 / 科普类内容(main 号默认)

styles.body: font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #3f3f3f; line-height: 1.8; letter-spacing: 0.6px; word-spacing: 2px; padding: 15px 0;
styles.h1: font-size: 21px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a1a2e; text-align: center; margin: 36px 0 24px; padding-bottom: 14px;
styles.h2: font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a1a2e; margin: 32px 0 16px; padding: 8px 0 8px 14px; border-left: 4px solid #4a6cf7; background: linear-gradient(to right, #f0f4ff, transparent); border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0; line-height: 1.5;
styles.h3: font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #2d3748; margin: 24px 0 12px; padding-left: 10px; border-left: 2px solid #4a6cf7;
styles.blockquote: margin: 24px 0; padding: 16px 20px 16px 24px; background: #f8f9fc; border-left: 3px solid #4a6cf7; color: #5a6577; font-size: 14px; border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0; line-height: 1.85; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 6px; margin: 20px auto; display: block; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
styles.code_inline: background: #f1f3f8; color: #4a6cf7; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'Menlo', 'Consolas', 'SF Mono', monospace;
styles.code_block: background: #1e1e2e; color: #cdd6f4; padding: 18px 22px; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.7; font-family: 'Menlo', 'Consolas', 'SF Mono', monospace; overflow-x: auto; white-space: pre-wrap; word-wrap: break-word; margin: 20px 0;
styles.hr: border: none; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, #d1d9e6, transparent); margin: 36px 0;
styles.a: color: #4a6cf7; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(74,108,247,0.3);
styles.table: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 20px 0; font-size: 14px; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden;
styles.th: background: #4a6cf7; color: #ffffff; padding: 12px 14px; text-align: left; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px;
styles.caption: font-size: 12px; color: #a0aec0; text-align: center; margin-top: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
styles.section_divider: text-align: center; color: #c5cee0; letter-spacing: 10px; font-size: 12px; margin: 32px 0; user-select: none;
